bits.premise: Balding can look like stepdad car-owner energy.
A memorial hand tattoo can make masturbation feel incestuous.

lines.text: Hey, what's up, what's up, what's up?
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: All right, no gratitude here, no problem.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: That's the problem with people today.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: There's no fucking gratitude anywhere.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I saw a guy with a forehead, a hair say
lines.label: setup

lines.text: he had a bad hair day.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I was like, "Bitch, I look like I drive a Honda CRV
lines.label: setup

lines.text: "as a stepdad."
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: That's what people are missing, man.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: And one of the things that I was gratefully blessed with
lines.label: setup

lines.text: was my dad had a heart transplant.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: So every day he woke up was a grateful day, right?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And I got this tattoo in memorance of him.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And it says, "All this extra time."
lines.label: setup

lines.text: That was my dad's motto.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I had a Cuban guy tattoo it, and I was like,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: "Mira Emmanuel, I don't wanna see no silent H's
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: in that bitch.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: No tildes."
lines.label: tag

lines.text: And I love it, and I love everything it stands for,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: but the only thing I regret is where I put it,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: 'cause it's on my right hand.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I gotta go jerk off.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I'm like, "Papi, oh yeah."
lines.label: tag

lines.text: You already had your time, you know what I mean?
lines.label: tag

lines.text: But it does stay true to something my dad always told me.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: He said, "Life's gonna get hard. Life's gonna get rough.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: But if you need a hand, I'll always be there for you."
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And I was like, "Goddamn. Not like that."
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Thank y'all. My name is C. Bass Matart.
lines.label: fluff
